decision_surface.buffer_note: Table 6.16: level I_t,S is replenished every t hours (period tied to level). Buffer chosen at campaign start, FIXED for the campaign. One policy per buffer level.
decision_surface.tactical_action: Discrete(3) weekly shifts {S1,S2,S3}; effect at k+1; min dwell 1 week; switching logged
decision_surface.factorial_disclosure: The 6x3 grid is a factorial EXTENSION built from thesis-native levels; the thesis varied buffers at S=1 and capacity at I=0 (one factor at a time).

family_note: All 9 risks enabled; family sets which category runs at thesis Table 6.12 '+' levels; others at current. R3 enabled at current (~absent at campaign scale) and reserved for OOD stress tapes.
horizon_note: Final campaign length (52/104/260) frozen at pilot per the censoring rule (<10% censored recoveries).
